name: White Wine Marinade
recipeIngredient: 1 Medium Red Onion, Sliced 1/4 Inch Thick
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a non-reactive bowl.
2. Cover the bowl and refrigerate overnight to allow flavors to meld.
3. Add meat to the bowl, ensuring all sides are coated with the marinade.
4. Cover again and marinate for at least 3 to 4 hours in the refrigerator.
Alternatively, place the meat and marinade in a zip-top bag and refrigerate.
This method helps coat the meat more evenly.
5. The marinade can be used with fish, poultry, fowl, pork, or veal.
6. When marinating fish, chicken, or fowl, do not let it marinate for more than 3 to 4 hours,
as it may start to cook the meat.
7. Pork and veal can remain in the marinade for up to 24 hours without issue.
